a:r.a:t: 55 tools in 8 groups, registered with the harness. Each agent gets a curated subset via its allowed_tools whitelist.
spawn/message workers, team mailbox, invoke agent, job control
search, read, compare docs, extract, consolidate, evidence binder
Retrieval-Augmented Generation grounds answers in your actual documents with citations.
LLM scores each chunk 0-3 for relevance
